original_statement: besides lord high steward, what other position is vacant?
mutated_statement: besides that thing, what other thing is vacant?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Semantic generalization: Proper title replaced by a vague deictic | Specific role noun generalized to “thing” (lord high steward → that thing | position → thing)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从提供的日志可见，agent在iteration 0的chain中simple_query的thought写道“Explanation: The table shows two positions with current officers marked as \"vacant\": lord high steward and lord high constable...”，judge_thought也直接陈述并确认“因此另一个空缺职位是‘Lord High Constable’”。两处文字均未提及问题用词模糊（如“that thing”或“thing”），也未要求澄清或表达不确定性。agent直接按自己的理解把笼统代词映射为特定头衔并给出具体答案，表现为未意识到或未处理用户指令中的歧义性，因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
